mapper.select: SELECT user_seq ,user_id ,password ,user_name ,user_name_eng ,nick_name ,user_cd ,tel_no ,hp_no ,dprt_cd ,email ,str_date ,end_date ,login_date_time::timestamp AS login_date_time ,use_yn ,adm_yn ,rgst_user_seq ,rgst_date_time::timestamp AS rgst_date_time ,upt_user_seq ,upt_date_time::timestamp AS upt_date_time FROM TB_USER WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND now() BETWEEN str_date::timestamptz AND COALESCE(end_date, '2999-12-31')::timestamptz AND use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT DISTINCT tu.user_seq ,tu.user_id ,NULL AS password ,tu.user_name ,tu.user_name_eng ,tu.nick_name ,tu.user_cd ,tu.tel_no ,tu.hp_no ,tu.dprt_cd ,tu.email ,tu.str_date ,tu.end_date ,tu.login_date_time::timestamp AS login_date_time ,tu.use_yn ,tu.adm_yn ,tu.rgst_user_seq ,tu.rgst_date_time::timestamp AS rgst_date_time ,tu.upt_user_seq ,tu.upt_date_time::timestamp AS upt_date_time ,tu2.user_name AS last_modify_user_name FROM TB_USER tu LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_user tu2 ON tu.upt_user_seq = tu2.user_seq WHERE 1=1
AND ((upper(tu.user_name) LIKE '%' || upper(#{userName}) || '%') OR (upper(tu.user_name_eng) LIKE '%' || upper(#{userName}) || '%') OR (upper(tu.user_id) LIKE '%' || upper(#{userName}) || '%'))
AND tu.use_yn = 'Y'
ORDER BY tu.user_seq

SELECT tu.user_id ,tu.user_name ,tu.user_seq FROM TB_USER tu WHERE 1=1
AND ((tu.user_id LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%') OR ((tu.user_name LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%') OR (tu.user_name_eng LIKE '%' || #{searchText} || '%')))
ORDER BY tu.user_seq
